title: Event-driven Email SaaS
description: Full route for an email-focused SaaS: auth, subscriber database, Stripe billing, background email processing with Inngest, sending via Resend, and production deployment.

steps.description: Initialize Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Add user authentication and organization management with Clerk
Set up Drizzle ORM for subscribers, campaigns, and send-log tables
Add subscription billing — free/pro plans gating send volume
Set up Inngest for async email batch processing, retry logic, and scheduled sends
Integrate Resend for transactional and bulk email delivery
Add error monitoring for failed sends and background job failures
Deploy to Vercel — Inngest connects to the deployed endpoint automatically
